label: professional_details
value: Working part-time at a local hospital while pursuing a BSN (Bachelor of Science in Nursing).

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Considering strategies for managing rotating shifts and stress, including attending a weekly yoga class for healthcare professionals, using mindfulness and meditation apps like Headspace, Calm, and Insight Timer, engaging in physical activities like yoga, gym workouts, and outdoor activities, maintaining healthy eating habits with plant-based snacks high in protein, improving sleep hygiene, seeking professional support through therapy or counseling, joining peer support groups, utilizing time management tools like Google Calendar, Trello, Todoist, or Asana, practicing relaxation techniques such as deep breathing exercises and progressive muscle relaxation, journaling, engaging in creative outlets, attending workshops and seminars on stress management, taking online courses on mindfulness and self-care, and regularly assessing stress levels and consulting specialists if needed. Also interested in tracking stress-reduction activities using apps such as MyFitnessPal, Strava, Yoga Wake Up, Meditrack, Habitica, Daylio, Wellio, Fitbit App, Lumosity, and Sanvello.

label: dietary_preferences
value: Interested in plant-based snacks that are high in protein to ensure adequate protein intake without relying heavily on meat.

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Expanding reading interests to include historical fiction novels after enjoying some recommended by a colleague. Previously read mostly non-fiction and biographies. Interested in staying updated with new books.

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in using a shared digital calendar (like Google Calendar) to manage family and work schedules, and educational apps to support children's learning.

label: important_personal_details
value: Volunteering with a local healthcare outreach program providing free health screenings and educational workshops.

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Wants to manage time effectively to attend children's after-school events and help with homework without neglecting personal goals, specifically balancing family time with studying for BSN.
